/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/ban-ts-comment */ // @ts-ignore `lightningcss` may not be installed import type Lightningcss from 'lightningcss' /* eslint-enable @typescript-eslint/ban-ts-comment */ export type LightningCSSOptions = Omit< Lightningcss.BundleAsyncOptions<Lightningcss.CustomAtRules>, | 'filename' | 'resolver' | 'minify' | 'sourceMap' | 'analyzeDependencies' // properties not overridden by Vite, but does not make sense to set by end users | 'inputSourceMap' | 'projectRoot' >
